# 新闻速递 2026-03-16

## MercadoLibre
- MercadoLibre财报后股价暴跌，市场关注其买入或规避风险的潜在影响（[未知来源](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMimAFBVV95cUxPYzF4NWQ3eXFzUHJoUlgteUR5Z2hFclRpakZ1VldoRG9ER1BQNUxCV0gya1ZPSllPTjBLajhXeEFRQlcwd3BPaC1kZGk3SFNpR2E2WmVDaGRLRWY0eWZTN09hM2FXSWFveGlPUU5NazNlenVVeVFYcEhycXJoSVJ2SnVsTVpNLWlhMlNUeWRYSmRqYWltRUtMLQ?oc=5)）
- Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria S.A.增持MercadoLibre股份，或预示机构对其增长前景持乐观态度（[未知来源](https://news.google.?oc=5)）
- 市场对比分析亚马逊与MercadoLibre的成长潜力，凸显投资者对电商巨头未来表现的持续关注（[未知来源](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE9fOGw0QXlVNzBCMDlHdHFCMmRjazRNU0xkcmd0SE96OWstWGJuTlRJR3NxTkstWXRfZjdzYWNObHBDb3dmMGpDZ0pBeGJnWnRyTnR0eGMzUlVHX24zcU1lTXV3d9IBY0FVX3lxTE9fOGw0QXlVNzBCMDlHdHFCMmRjazRNU0xkcmd0SE96OWstWGJuTlRJR3NxTkstWXRfZjdzYWNObHBDb3dmMGpDZ0pBeGJnWnRyTnR0eGMzUlVHX24zcU1lTXV3dw?oc=5)）
- MercadoLibre股价跌幅超大盘，暗示市场对其特定风险的担忧加剧（[未知来源](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMisAFBVV95cUxQOGpZYTdRWUwtVl9TYU8tWlFIRTZzN255dGhUcWwtNFh2bUtYcUpsSHRvRmd6cld2c0FIU1dTTGF5NUlDVGlCYk13UDk0YjhQNnNZMVpwb2FockRFYTdlZDJVUGlLbWlyYlNHYmlqT0VsSGlfOGN5Y2hXdDZJSWxmTlluRkNDaFZ1ZkRVY3VUc3FmTjl1TEYxSDlqY3ZsYzJrSXQxZzNxSnlaTEg5NnEtZg?oc=5)）
- EFG Asset Management Americas Corp.增持MercadoLibre股份，显示机构投资者对其未来增长保持信心（[未知来源](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## Amazon
- 京东进军欧洲市场与亚马逊正面竞争，预计将加剧区域电商格局变化（[未知来源](https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-03-16/jd-com-s-european-push-pits-chinese-retailer-against-amazon)）
- 亚马逊、谷歌等巨头AI资本支出激增，苹果暂未大规模参与，凸显科技公司AI战略差异或重塑行业竞争格局（[未知来源](https://asymco.com/2026/03/10/the-most-brilliant-move-in-corporate-history/)）

## Tencent
- 小马智行Robotaxi整合至腾讯出行服务，有望加速L4级自动驾驶的商业化落地（[未知来源](https://pandaily.com/pony-ai-robotaxi-integrates-with-tencent-mobility-services-to-accelerate-l4-autonomous-driving-deployment)）
- 腾讯云与腾讯AI赞助OpenClaw AI社区，解决此前争议并降低技术门槛，利好AI生态合作（[未知来源](https://technode.com/2026/03/16/tencent-cloud-becomes-sponsor-of-openclaw-ai-community/)）

## Coupang
- 韩国劳动部调查Coupang员工死亡事件涉嫌掩盖，或对其企业声誉及合规性构成负面影响（[未知来源](https://news.google.?oc=5)）

## 市场动态
- 中国汽车巨头利用闲置海外工厂实施轻资产全球扩张战略，有望降低成本并提升国际市场份额（[未知来源](https://www.scmp.com/business/china-business/article/3346472/carpool-chinese-giants-use-idled-foreign-plants-fuel-global-expansion?utm_source=rss_feed)）
- 中国经济2026年初表现强劲，零售销售与投资增长预示全年目标可期并有助于缓解通缩压力（[未知来源](https://www.scmp.com/economy/economic-indicators/article/3346697/chinas-economy-starts-2026-strongly-retail-sales-investment-rise?utm_source=rss_feed)）
- EQDP拓展至Pre-IPO私营企业，有望提振上市管道并为公司注入增长资本（[未知来源](https://www.businesstimes.com.sg/companies-markets/eqdps-expansion-pre-ipo-private-firms-could-boost-listing-pipeline-observers)）

## Shopee
- Shopee菲律宾站点特定商品热销，揭示其在区域市场及品类的商业活力（[未知来源](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiWEFVX3lxTE44dktsOHNOaU05Rzg2TGN3VjZVT3FRUG01ZmV6YXJFQ2tnLWgzYmdWdVY1U2RWNTJxaVBlRUZFdk9mNlRseGF6SjVqbW1zclRkeElZOWFLOXc?oc=5)）

- Shopee马来西亚站点销售汽车配件，显示其在垂直细分市场的产品布局与销售潜力（[未知来源](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMioAFBVV95cUxOaGZyLWtndnVsNTVfT1pWTXNTS0tqMkEwVVlBb2NSbXpsS0w2S0x4MzBxempBVHI3YnhndmVWdzIwMHV6VWdGX0pDWFZfVG81RTM2d0NEZ0lVYkp2SHJoa1JaSHpDVVcwM2o0LXVyVXl4ZXVkUmQ0Q1FMMFZqUXFSWHRFa0xfWUFIWG1sdTNKVzJjMVJnZXgwMVdsaFRVbGhN?oc=5)）
